parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
participant subject
participant blockchain
participant issuer

activate subject
subject -> blockchain: look up issuer DID
activate blockchain
blockchain --> subject: issuer public key
deactivate blockchain

subject -> subject: encrypt request with issuer public key
subject -> subject: sign request with subject private key

subject -> issuer: request credential
activate issuer

issuer -> blockchain: look up subject DID
activate blockchain
blockchain --> issuer: subject public key
deactivate blockchain

issuer -> issuer: validate request signature
issuer -> issuer: decrypt request with issuer private key
issuer -> issuer: validate facts of requested credential
issuer -> issuer: create Verified Credential (VC)
issuer -> issuer: sign VC with issuer private key

issuer --> subject: verified credential
deactivate issuer

subject -> subject: store credential
deactivate subject

@enduml
```
